title: Bare Bones x Reackt's Mace Revamped
description: A Bare Bones–style retexture of Reackt’s Mace Revamped resource pack.
body:
This resource pack retextures the **Reackt's Mace Revamped** mace to match the visual style of the **Bare Bones** texture pack. The original model using a 3D model when held and a 2D icon in inventories and item frames remain unchanged. Only the textures are adjusted to align with Bare Bones’ simplified shapes, reduced detail, and clean color palette.

### Resource Packs
- Original Resource Pack:
[Reackt's Mace Revamped](https://modrinth.com/project/vBDwyWsA)
- Bare Bones:
[Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/project/rox3U8B6)
